title: chrysanthemum khartense
intro: Chrysanthemum khartense, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to China and Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Chrysanthemum khartense are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and volatile oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum khartense include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an anti-oxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Chrysanthemum khartense can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
